title: Modern E-commerce Platform
description: Production-grade full-stack e-commerce platform with real-time features.
longDescription: A highly scalable, enterprise-level e-commerce platform built with TypeScript and modern technologies. The backend is fully production-ready using Express.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and Redis with advanced features like JWT authentication, Stripe payment integration, real-time chat using Socket.IO and WebRTC, and intelligent caching. The frontend is built with Next.js 15 and Tailwind CSS, featuring authentication, product browsing, and cart functionality, with ongoing development for checkout and admin dashboards.

title: Freelancing Platform
description: Full-stack freelancing platform connecting clients and freelancers.
longDescription: A secure and scalable freelancing platform designed to connect project owners with freelancers. Built with a Node.js and Express backend using MongoDB, featuring JWT-based authentication, Cloudinary media management, and robust API architecture. The frontend is developed using React with Vite, React Query, and SCSS, delivering a fast and responsive user experience. The platform supports project posting, applications, and full workflow from hiring to collaboration.

title: CRM System
description: Modern CRM system for managing leads, sales, and analytics.
longDescription: A fully functional CRM system designed for efficient business operations. Built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel, it provides lead and contact management, interactive dashboards with real-time analytics, deal pipelines, and advanced filtering. The application includes persistent state handling and supports both dark and light modes, delivering a smooth and intuitive user experience.
